variables.notes: No explicit total current assets line is present on the Balance Sheet preview.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash line; exact match for cash and cash equivalents.
Could represent cash balances, but the cleaner reported total is Cash and cash equivalents.
Restricted cash is not the standard CHE definition and is long-term.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at year end
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

variables.notes: Selected the direct balance-sheet cash total.

candidates.why: Cash-flow change line, not a balance-sheet stock of total current liabilities.

variables.notes: No explicit total current liabilities line is present on the Balance Sheet preview.

candidates.why: Explicit short-term debt line; strong match for short-term borrowings.
Typically short-term borrowings under IFRS/financial firms, but tenor is not explicitly stated in the label.
Borrowings-related liability, but current vs non-current is unclear.
Debt-like but should be excluded from STD baseline because it is lease-related.

variables.notes: INSURANCE. Included explicit short-term bonds/bills and money market loans as likely short-term debt. Manual review recommended because Money market loans is not explicitly labeled current and the issuer appears financial-sector-like, increasing classification ambiguity.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Direct total PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred total/net PPE measure.
Gross PPE exists, but net total is preferred when available.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net
candidates.why: Tangible asset but lease-related and not total PPE.

variables.notes: Preferred total net PPE line selected.

candidates.row_label: Net cash from (to) operating activities Investing activities
candidates.why: Despite the malformed label, values reconcile as the net cash flow from operating activities total.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: This is an intermediate subtotal before working-capital changes, not final operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Other Operating Cash Flow - Cash Flow - to Reconcile
candidates.why: A component/reconciling item, not the total operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash from (to) operating activities Investing activities

variables.notes: Chosen outside the shortlist because it is clearly the CFO total despite the concatenated/malformed label.
